backend.changelog: Selective generate: tick assemblies in the BOM tree to export only the selected assemblies and everything below them. Empty selection still generates the full BOM. Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.92.

cadBridge.changelog: Supports selective generate runs from the gateway (1.1.42+): outputs are produced only for the assemblies ticked in the BOM tree, while the root assembly stays open without being exported.
